restore_old_photo.prompt: Full professional restoration of this vintage photograph. Remove all damage including tears, fading, scratches, and discoloration,keep same color tone as original photo

restore_old_photo_colorize.prompt: Full professional restoration of this vintage photograph. Remove all damage including tears, fading, scratches, and discoloration and colorize the photo.Use natural skin tones and historically accurate colors. Avoid artificial saturation.

colorize_photo.prompt: Colorize this black and white image realistically.Use natural skin tones and historically accurate colors. Avoid artificial saturation.

enhance_photo.prompt: Enhance image quality while preserving details.
